headline: Earnings To Watch: Nike (NKE) Reports Q2 Results Tomorrow
summary: Athletic apparel brand Nike (NYSE:NKE) will be reporting results this Tuesday after market hours. Here’s what investors should know.

content.title: Earnings To Watch: Nike (NKE) Reports Q2 Results Tomorrow

headline: Why Did MSTR, BABA, NKE Stocks Tumble To 52-Week Lows Last Week?
summary: Strategy, Alibaba Group and Nike shares slumped to 52-week lows last week amid declining Bitcoin prices, an accusation from Anthropic, and a series of price target cuts, respectively.

content.title: Why Did MSTR, BABA, NKE Stocks Tumble To 52-Week Lows Last Week?
content.summary: Strategy, Alibaba Group and Nike shares slumped to 52-week lows last week amid declining Bitcoin prices, an accusation from Anthropic, and a series of price target cuts, respectively.

content.title: 5 Philosophies For Building Projects People Can't Forget
content.description:
*Run your life like a $100M business. Get the system here:* https://clickhubspot.com/ff97bf

Show Notes:
(0:00) Basketball camp with billionaires
(2:24) Irritation leads to innovation
(8:30) the yes test
(12:56) the bigger you go, the easier it gets
(15:17) the product is you pushed out
(25:28) doesn't matter how rich you are, everyone is a little kid
(34:46) The guts of Steve Prefontaine
(40:15) NIKE branding
(46:25) The NIKE playbook broken down
(58:26) An argument about values
